data.name: My wife is a real estate agent
data.detailed_description:
🏙️ My wife is a real estate agent — a candid visual novel about desires, boundaries, and temptations hidden behind the facade of a perfect marriage.

You are her husband.

She is a beautiful, confident woman who sells expensive real estate and seems to be flirting with clients more and more often.

📞 It all starts with innocent conversations.

💄 Then — late apartment viewings.

💋 And soon you hear strange noises coming from the shower when you come home earlier than usual.

🔍 In the game you will find:

🔥 Hot sex scenes
👠 An elegant and liberated wife
🎭 Emotional dialogues
🎧 Atmospheric music
💥 High-quality renders

🖤 Your wife is changing before your eyes.

You feel control slipping away, and instead of being her husband, you become a spectator to her games.

👁‍🗨 Accept your role as a cuckold.

Maybe that's what excites you the most?

data.short_description: Your wife is a real estate agent, beautiful and confident, but increasingly distant from you. You're an observer of her seductive games. Discover a story of passion, jealousy and cuckold fantasies.💋
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 322 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 322 MB 可用空間
